info.title: Meeting Notes Summarizer
info.description:
## Meeting Notes Summarizer API

Automatically extract **summaries**, **action items**, and **risks** from raw meeting notes.

### Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/health` | Liveness check |
| POST | `/summarize` | Summarize meeting notes |

### Usage

1. Supply a tracking ticket ID and the raw text of your meeting notes.
2. The API returns a structured summary with action items (owner, due date) and identified risks.

get.description: Return a simple liveness status for the service.

post.description:
Summarize raw meeting notes for a given ticket.

- **ticket_id**: JIRA or tracking ticket ID (e.g. `PROJ-123`)
- **notes**: Free-form meeting notes text

Returns a `SummarizeResponse` containing:
- A high-level **summary** of the meeting
- Extracted **action items** with optional owner and due date
- Identified **risks** or blockers

422.description: Validation error — e.g. empty ticket_id or notes

owner.title: Owner
owner.description: Person or team responsible for the task

due_date.title: Due Date
due_date.description: Due date or deadline for the task

examples.task: Alice will deploy the service by Friday

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Raw meeting notes to be summarized
examples: Alice will deploy the service by Friday. Bob needs to update the docs. Risk: dependency on external API not yet confirmed.

examples.notes: Alice will deploy the service by Friday. Bob needs to update the docs. Risk: dependency on external API not yet confirmed.

ticket_id.title: Ticket Id
ticket_id.description: The ticket ID from the request

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: High-level summary of the meeting notes

action_items.title: Action Items
action_items.description: List of action items extracted from the notes

risks.title: Risks
risks.description: List of risks or blockers identified in the notes

action_items.task: Alice will deploy the service by Friday

risks: dependency on external API not yet confirmed
examples.summary: The meeting reviewed progress and identified follow-up work, ownership, and operational risks.

tags.name: summarize
tags.description: Extract summaries, action items, and risks from meeting notes.
